/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/raftsim_jolt_smoke_harness.dir/tools/jolt_smoke_harness.cpp.o -o raftsim_jolt_smoke_harness  libraftsim_water.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
